repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memories originate from the same `torch#1` category and involve common failure patterns for ca6k custom ops: `5014fe8c` addresses a GetInputShape/StorageShape type mismatch in host code; `84bb2c98` covers the frequent setter-method error on TilingData; `a6bc156b` fixes redefinition of REG_OP in op_proto.h; `d6e3247f` provides a kernel compilation fix for invalid floating–unsigned casts; and `0e7a3f8b` handles a vector core exception (507035) at runtime. These diverse hints are likely applicable to the repair of ca6k_00525.
